changeSet.author: alyona
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR ALTER TRIGGER trg_project_tasks_counter ON project_tasks AFTER INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE AS BEGIN SET NOCOUNT ON;
UPDATE p SET active_tasks_count = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_tasks pt WHERE pt.project_id = p.id AND pt.status != 'DONE' ) FROM projects p WHERE p.id IN ( SELECT project_id FROM inserted UNION SELECT project_id FROM deleted ); END;
